description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and defines a single build stage. Add a build job that runs: export IMAGE_TAG=$(echo -en $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME | tr -c '[:alnum:]_.-' '-'), docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker build --pull -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG ., and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG. The job runs in the build stage and has no additional rules, caches, or artifacts.
